nasb.text: They spoke to him, saying, “If you will be kind to this people and please them and speak good words to them, then they will be your servants forever.”

esv.text: And they said to him, “If you will be good to this people and please them and speak good words to them, then they will be your servants forever.”

cnv.text: 他們對他說：“如果王善待人民，使他們喜悅，對他們說好話，他們就必永遠作你的僕人。”

ccb.text: 他们回禀说：“王若善待这些百姓，使他们喜悦，对他们好言相待，他们会永远做王的仆人。”
